commands.name: leos_help
commands.stdout:
usage: leos [-h] [--workspace WORKSPACE] [--auto-approve]
            {validate-policy,list-tools,dry-run,replay,run,sign-policy,audit-check,validate-task,inspect-audit,trace-html,trace,eval,proof,manifest,queue-demo} ...

Leos autonomous-agent kernel.

positional arguments:
  {validate-policy,list-tools,dry-run,replay,run,sign-policy,audit-check,validate-task,inspect-audit,trace-html,trace,eval,proof,manifest,queue-demo}
    validate-policy     Validate a policy configuration file.
    list-tools          List available tools in the registry.
    dry-run             Dry-run a tool against a clean world state.
    replay              Replay an audit log and reconstruct world state.
    run                 Run a goal with steps from a JSON file.
    sign-policy         Sign a policy configuration and output a signed
                        manifest.
    audit-check         Run anomaly detection over an audit log.
    validate-task       Validate a task JSON file without executing.
    inspect-audit       Replay audit log with anomaly detection.
    trace-html          Render an audit log as a static HTML trace.
    trace               Render an audit log trace.
    eval                Run evaluation suites.
    proof               Proof document commands.
    manifest            Output registered tool manifests as JSON.
    queue-demo          Demonstrate task queue lifecycle.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --workspace WORKSPACE
                        Sandbox workspace for reversible file actions.
  --auto-approve        Approve demo actions that require human approval.

commands.name: leos_eval_help
leos_trace_help
commands.stdout:
usage: leos trace [-h] --audit AUDIT [--format {markdown,html}]
                  [--output OUTPUT] [--title TITLE]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --audit AUDIT         Path to a JSONL audit log file.
  --format {markdown,html}
  --output OUTPUT       Output path (default: stdout).
  --title TITLE         HTML page title.

commands.name: leos_proof_help
commands.stdout:
usage: leos proof [-h] {generate} ...

positional arguments:
  {generate}
    generate  Generate proof documents.

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit
